name: woo-client-generator
description: Local generator for WooCommerce REST snapshots and TypeScript client artifacts.

scripts.generate:woo: npm run generate:woo:manifest && npm run generate:woo:sdk-manifest && npm run generate:woo:sdk && npm run generate:woo:definitions
scripts.generate:woo:full: npm run generate:woo:snapshot -- "$@" && npm run generate:woo
scripts.woo:fixture:bootstrap: docker compose -f scripts/woo/fixture/docker-compose.yml run --rm wpcli sh /workspace/scripts/woo/fixture/bootstrap.sh
scripts.woo:fixture:up: docker compose -f scripts/woo/fixture/docker-compose.yml up -d db wordpress
